name: vts-local
description: Drive vs-token-safer's vs-search tools with any local LLM (Ollama, full-GPU) so Claude delegates cheap, high-volume code-location and reading to a free local model — and gets back only the compact file:line answer. Model-agnostic (default gemma4:e4b). Local-only.

plugins.name: vts-local-orchestrator
plugins.description: Any local LLM (Ollama) drives vs-token-safer's vs-search tools; Claude delegates cheap code-location to it. Model-agnostic (default gemma4:e4b). CLI + web dashboard (token-savings panel) + delegation-routing skill.
